title: Joie Fresh Stretch Lemon Pod – Reusable Silicone Food Saver for Fridge, BPA-Free & Dishwasher Safe, Yellow
features: CONTAINS: One reusable lemon storage pod designed to keep cut lemons fresh, firm, and odor-free in the fridge
EASY TO USE: Simply place the cut side of the lemon face down, stretch the silicone cover over, and secure the seal
COMPACT & ORGANIZED STORAGE: The bright yellow design makes it easy to find and saves space in your fridge
KEEPS PRODUCE FRESH LONGER: Slows down oxidation and spoilage, preventing delicate fruits from being squashed
BPA-FREE & DISHWASHER SAFE: Made from durable, BPA-free silicone; dishwasher safe for effortless cleaning
